page.title: Subscription Plan
page.desc: Review your plan, usage, and upgrade options.

payDue.title: Subscription payment due
payDue.hint: Pay by bank transfer, then click "I have paid". Your subscription activates once the PlanQ team confirms.
payDue.waitingHint: Your payment notification was received. The subscription activates automatically once the PlanQ team confirms.

payment.title: Payment Method
payment.globalDesc: Visa · Mastercard · Amex · JCB · UnionPay — 180+ currencies
payment.koreaDesc: KakaoPay · Naver Pay · Toss · Bank Transfer
payment.comingSoonDesc: Operator manually adjusts plans for now. Send an upgrade request.

pastDue.title: Payment past due
pastDue.desc: Payment due since {{date}}. Grace period starting soon.

grace.title: Grace period — {{days}} day(s) left
grace.desc: After grace ends, this workspace will be downgraded to Free. Data is preserved but new actions are restricted.

demoted.title: Downgraded to Free
demoted.desc: Workspace was downgraded due to missed payment. Pay now to restore your plan (data preserved).

checkout.title: Checkout

bank.title: Bank Account
bank.contactSupport: PlanQ billing account is not yet configured. Please contact support@planq.kr.
bank.memoHint: Include Payment ID #{{paymentId}} or workspace name with your transfer.

payerName.label: Payer name (optional)
payerName.hint: Helps us match the deposit faster if it differs from your account.

checkout.notice: After transferring to the PlanQ account, click "I have paid" to notify us. Your subscription activates once the PlanQ team confirms the deposit. Auto-canceled if not paid within 24h.

errors.markPaidFailed: Failed to mark as paid. Please verify and retry.
errors.notifyFailed: Failed to send notification. Please try again.

notified.title: Payment notification received
notified.desc: Your subscription will activate once the PlanQ team confirms the deposit. This may take a little while.

confirm.upgradeDesc: Select a payment method to proceed.
confirm.downgradeDesc: Applied at the end of current billing cycle ({{date}}). Excess data will be read-only for 30 days afterward.

enterprise.title: Enterprise — custom contracts for larger teams
enterprise.desc: For organizations with 100+ teammates, custom SLAs, dedicated onboarding, and specific security or integration needs. We'll tailor the quote to your requirements.

inquiry.title: Enterprise Inquiry
inquiry.subtitle: We'll reach out within 1–2 business days.
inquiry.name: Name
inquiry.messagePh: Team size, use case, desired start date, etc.
inquiry.successDesc: We'll contact you at {{email}} within 1–2 business days.
inquiry.error: Failed to send — please try again
